title: TFC Textile (Legacy)
description: TFC  Textile is a addon for the TFC addon "Ambiental" that adds new clothing.
body:
# This mod is no longer supported, and will no longer get any new content. Only ports and critical fixes.

TFC Textile adds more clothing sets for the TerraFirmaCraft addon Ambiental, and aims to diversify and add more vanity options for your clothing needs. Currently, it adds 12 new clothing sets, made from different animals and materials.
